segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval tavern interior featuring stone vaulted ceilings and warm lantern lighting. Several NPCs are seated at wooden tables throughout the hall, while one figure walks across the background from right to left. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric, with the camera remaining stationary throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a dimly lit medieval tavern interior. It begins with a static view of the hall, where warm lantern light contrasts against the cool tones of stone vaulted ceilings. As the camera lingers, the moody environment is punctuated by the presence of NPCs seated at wooden tables. The scene remains still, focusing on the quiet ambiance before a single figure walks across the background from right to left.
